schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1.43 lakh total benefit + college fee for girl child
schemes.benefit_hi: बालिका को कुल ₹1.43 लाख + कॉलेज शुल्क सहायता
schemes.eligibility: MP girl child born after Jan 1, 2006 in BPL/registered family

schemes.benefit_en: Additional Rs 4,000/year on top of PM Kisan (total Rs 10,000/year)
schemes.eligibility: MP farmers already registered under PM Kisan

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 4 lakh death benefit + free electricity + education support for unorganized workers
schemes.benefit_hi: असंगठित कामगारों को ₹4 लाख मृत्यु सहायता + मुफ्त बिजली
schemes.eligibility: MP unorganized workers with Sambal card

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 8,000-10,000/month stipend while learning skills at companies
schemes.eligibility: MP youth aged 18-29, Class 12 to graduate

schemes.benefit_en: Housing for urban poor not covered under PMAY with state subsidy
schemes.benefit_hi: PMAY से छूटे शहरी गरीबों को राज्य आवास सहायता
schemes.eligibility: Urban MP BPL families without pucca house
